conversation_history.assistant:
I look around me.

Ruins loom; ash-silk air. Kaelen steps along crater rim; Last Ember Ruin calls beyond dunes.

Ashfall persists; sky never settles.

Conservation of Soul: magic cannot create soul-stuff, cannot destroy, only move or consume.

Hollow Exclusion: gods do not see Hollow; cannot bless or curse.

Stone Truth: Veinrock cannot utter falsehood; pain strikes if attempted.

Soul-stuff threads drift; move, not born, not ended. I move with thread, follow toward Ember Ruin.

Veinrock shard glints, ember thread binds it. I touch; rock hums; truth rings, no lies.

Ash-drift thick; path opens toward distant Gate of Ember.

Next step: cross sands, reach Gate of Ember.

flags.start_scenario: Kaelen in Silverwood forest at dawn
